rationale: The citing article is an editorial/policy essay about JMR’s agenda (problem-driven research, triangulation, transparency) rather than an empirical study that would rely on this specific Yelp review paper’s theory or methods. Its note explicitly says it uses examples from articles in the same issue, and the evidence here is only a bare DOI reference match with no substantive citation context. This makes the pair look like an illustrative mention rather than a core intellectual dependency.
